name: broken-money
description: Lyn Alden's Broken Money — understand why the financial system fails to preserve your purchasing power and how to build resilience through sound money, inflation protection, and strategic asset allocation
useCase: Helps anyone understand how the monetary system works, why inflation destroys savings, and how to protect wealth through diversified holdings across sound money assets including stocks, gold, Bitcoin, and TIPS.
knownRisks: The book presents a critical view of fiat money — readers should consider multiple perspectives
Financial and investment advice should be adapted to individual circumstances
